# Indianapolis Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> Free Indianapolis bankruptcy guide for 2026. Compare Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13, local exemptions, filing costs, means test, and what to expect in your case.

## About
indianapolisbankruptcy.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Chapter 13 Bankruptcy in Indianapolis - Payment Plans, Dismissal Rates, Timeline: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/chapter-13.html
- Chapter 7 Bankruptcy in Indianapolis - Eligibility, Exemptions, Timeline: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/chapter-7.html
- How Much Does Bankruptcy Cost in Indianapolis? - Filing Fees, Attorney Fees: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/cost.html
- Indiana Bankruptcy Exemptions - What You Can Keep - Indianapolis: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/exemptions.html
- Indianapolis Bankruptcy FAQ - 15 Common Questions Answered: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/faq.html
- Indianapolis Bankruptcy - Chapter 7 & 13 Filing Guide: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/
- Indianapolis Bankruptcy Resources - Courts, Legal Aid, Credit Counseling: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/resources.html
- Indianapolis Bankruptcy Statistics - 91,333 Cases Analyzed: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/statistics.html
- What to Expect When Filing Bankruptcy - Timeline, 341 Meeting, Discharge - Indianapolis: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/what-to-expect.html
- Privacy Policy: https://indianapolisbankruptcy.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
